vllm.title: fix: only response [DONE] once when streaming response.
vllm.author: gesanqiu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: OpenAI streaming response only response one [DONE] for one request, while current implementation of vLLM response a [DONE] after every streaming response, should be an issue.

vllm.title: [Fix] Change /generate response-type to json for non-streaming
vllm.author: nicolasf
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds content-type=application/json on the /generate API response when not using streaming.
This fixes automatic deserialization when calling the API in Java using RestTemplate.
